# Gitlab Manage

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî GitLab write operations (HITL-gated).

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `gitlab_manage` | Create or update GitLab issues: create_issue, add_comment, close_issue. Human approval required for all operations. | `gitlab:write` | ‚úì | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "url": "",
  "token": ""
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "default_per_page": 20,
  "proxy": "",
  "timeout": 30,
  "token": "",
  "url": "",
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `default_per_page` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `20` | Default page size for paginated requests (default: 20). |
| `proxy` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `30` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `token` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | `""` | Personal Access Token (PAT).  Needs 'read_api' scope for gitlab_read and 'api' scope for gitlab_manage. |
| `url` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | `""` | Base URL of the GitLab instance, e.g. 'https://gitlab.com' or 'https://git.yourcompany.com'.  Must NOT include /api/v4. |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `true` | Verify TLS certificate of the GitLab server (default: true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_GITLAB_MANAGE__DEFAULT_PER_PAGE` | `default_per_page` | `integer` | `20` | ‚Äî | Default page size for paginated requests (default: 20). |
| `TOOL_GITLAB_MANAGE__PROXY` | `proxy` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL. |
| `TOOL_GITLAB_MANAGE__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | ‚Äî | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `TOOL_GITLAB_MANAGE__TOKEN` | `token` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Personal Access Token (PAT).  Needs 'read_api' scope for gitlab_read and 'api' scope for gitlab_manage. |
| `TOOL_GITLAB_MANAGE__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Base URL of the GitLab instance, e.g. 'https://gitlab.com' or 'https://git.yourcompany.com'.  Must NOT include /api/v4. |
| `TOOL_GITLAB_MANAGE__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | ‚Äî | Verify TLS certificate of the GitLab server (default: true). |

## Operations

### `gitlab_manage`

- **`add_comment`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [add_comment, close_issue] Issue IID (internal to project). |
  | `body` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add_comment] Comment body (Markdown supported). |

- **`close_issue`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [add_comment, close_issue] Issue IID (internal to project). |

- **`create_issue`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `title` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue] Issue title (required). |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue] Issue description (Markdown supported). |
  | `assignee_usernames` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create_issue] List of GitLab usernames to assign the issue to.  User IDs are resolved automatically. |
  | `labels` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create_issue] Label names to attach to the issue. |
  | `milestone_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [create_issue] Milestone ID to associate with the issue. |
  | `due_date` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue] Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). |
